name: Quick & Easy Fudgey Brownies
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Hershey's Unsweetened Baking Chocolate (broken into pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease a 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
3. In a large microwave-safe bowl, melt chocolate and butter together for 1-1/2 to 2 minutes at high power. Stir until smooth.
4. Add sugar and stir until well blended.
5. Add eggs and vanilla; mix well.
6. Add flour and nuts (if using); stir until well combined.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out almost clean.
9. Allow the brownies to cool completely on a wire rack.
10. Frost if desired and cut into squares (approximately 24 pieces).
